'''鈭歴-th-f''' ('''sathafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neoliberalize|neoliberalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neoliberalize|neoliberalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-th-f
|-
! Lemma
| sathafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sathafithi|sathafithi]] || [[word:sathafiji|sathafiji]] || [[word:sathafishi|sathafishi]] || [[word:sathafi|sathafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathafuthuth|sathafuthuth]] || [[word:sathafujuj|sathafujuj]] || [[word:sathafushush|sathafushush]] || [[word:sathaf|sathaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathafuthu|sathafuthu]] || [[word:sathafuju|sathafuju]] || [[word:sathafushu|sathafushu]] || [[word:sathafu|sathafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathafufuth|sathafufuth]] || [[word:sathafufuj|sathafufuj]] || [[word:sathafufush|sathafufush]] || [[word:sathafuf|sathafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sathafethe|sathafethe]] || [[word:sathafeje|sathafeje]] || [[word:sathafeshe|sathafeshe]] || [[word:sathafe|sathafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathafothoth|sathafothoth]] || [[word:sathafojoj|sathafojoj]] || [[word:sathafoshosh|sathafoshosh]] || [[word:sathaf|sathaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathafotho|sathafotho]] || [[word:sathafojo|sathafojo]] || [[word:sathafosho|sathafosho]] || [[word:sathafo|sathafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathafofoth|sathafofoth]] || [[word:sathafofoj|sathafofoj]] || [[word:sathafofosh|sathafofosh]] || [[word:sathafof|sathafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sathaf忙th忙|sathaf忙th忙]] || [[word:sathaf忙j忙|sathaf忙j忙]] || [[word:sathaf忙sh忙|sathaf忙sh忙]] || [[word:sathaf忙|sathaf忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sathafathath|sathafathath]] || [[word:sathafajaj|sathafajaj]] || [[word:sathafashash|sathafashash]] || [[word:sathaf|sathaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sathafatha|sathafatha]] || [[word:sathafaja|sathafaja]] || [[word:sathafasha|sathafasha]] || [[word:sathafa|sathafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sathafafath|sathafafath]] || [[word:sathafafaj|sathafafaj]] || [[word:sathafafash|sathafafash]] || [[word:sathafaf|sathafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:sathafasha|sathafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosathafasha|gosathafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisathafasha|gokisathafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:sathafn眉sha|sathafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosathafnkn眉sha|gosathafnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisathafn眉sha|gokisathafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sathafsh毛sha|sathafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosathafnksh毛sha|gosathafnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisathafsh毛sha|gokisathafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sathafrosha|sathafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosathafnkrosha|gosathafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisathafrosha|gokisathafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sathafmusha|sathafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosathafnkmusha|gosathafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisathafmusha|gokisathafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sathafsherasha|sathafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosathafnksherasha|gosathafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisathafsherasha|gokisathafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:sathafngasha|sathafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosathafnkngasha|gosathafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisathafngasha|gokisathafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sathafyasha|sathafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosathafnkyasha|gosathafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisathafyasha|gokisathafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sathafyamasha|sathafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosathafnkyamasha|gosathafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisathafyamasha|gokisathafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sathafn眉sh毛sha|sathafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosathafnkn眉sh毛sha|gosathafnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisathafn眉sh毛sha|gokisathafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sathafn眉rosha|sathafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosathafnkn眉rosha|gosathafnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisathafn眉rosha|gokisathafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sathafn眉musha|sathafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosathafnkn眉musha|gosathafnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisathafn眉musha|gokisathafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sathafsh毛n眉sha|sathafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosathafnksh毛n眉sha|gosathafnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisathafsh毛n眉sha|gokisathafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sathafsh毛rosha|sathafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosathafnksh毛rosha|gosathafnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisathafsh毛rosha|gokisathafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sathafsh毛musha|sathafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosathafnksh毛musha|gosathafnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisathafsh毛musha|gokisathafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sathafron眉sha|sathafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosathafnkron眉sha|gosathafnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisathafron眉sha|gokisathafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sathafrosh毛sha|sathafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosathafnkrosh毛sha|gosathafnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisathafrosh毛sha|gokisathafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sathafromusha|sathafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosathafnkromusha|gosathafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisathafromusha|gokisathafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sathafmun眉sha|sathafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosathafnkmun眉sha|gosathafnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisathafmun眉sha|gokisathafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sathafmush毛sha|sathafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosathafnkmush毛sha|gosathafnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisathafmush毛sha|gokisathafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sathafmurosha|sathafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosathafnkmurosha|gosathafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisathafmurosha|gokisathafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:sathaf|sathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:s忙th忙f|s忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hosathaf|hosathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hos忙th忙f|hos忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosathaf|hohosathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohos忙th忙f|hohos忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉sathaf|n眉sathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉s忙th忙f|n眉s忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sathaf|n眉n眉sathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉s忙th忙f|n眉n眉s忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂sathaf|n茂sathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂s忙th忙f|n茂s忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sathaf|n茂n茂sathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂s忙th忙f|n茂n茂s忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lusathaf|lusathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lus忙th忙f|lus忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulusathaf|lulusathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulus忙th忙f|lulus忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lisathaf|lisathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lis忙th忙f|lis忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilisathaf|lilisathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilis忙th忙f|lilis忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kosathaf|kosathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kos忙th忙f|kos忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosathaf|kokosathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokos忙th忙f|kokos忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kesathaf|kesathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kes忙th忙f|kes忙th忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesathaf|kekesathaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekes忙th忙f|kekes忙th忙f]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
